_doc: Cells the coverage matrix should show as N/A (not_expected) instead of 'missing': partitions whose report genuinely does NOT disclose a given statement (verified against the PDF — never used to hide an extraction gap for data that IS printed). statement='*' = every NON-CORE lane this partition is missing (core BS/PL/cross always stay flagged); statement may also be a single key or a LIST of keys. period and kind default to '*' (wildcard = every quarter / both consolidation bases) — use them for a bank that STRUCTURALLY never files a lane; period (and statement) may also be a LIST to scope a bank that omitted a lane only in some quarters. Entries are applied only when the cell is otherwise 'missing'.

not_disclosed.note: Arap Türk Bankası interim reports carry no branch/personnel count — the note-VIII "Yurt içi şube" table appears only in the year-end (Q4) note VIII (extracted), and there is no activity report. Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.
TSKB interim reports carry no branch/personnel count — the note-VIII table appears only at year-end (Q4, extracted). Verified full-document scan 2026-07-15.

Participation (Katılım) bank — interest-free; reports profit-share-rate risk (kâr payı oranı riski) as a market-risk capital charge + narrative, NOT the interest-rate repricing ladder (no Faizsiz/non-interest column, no asset-liability repricing schedule with a Toplam Pozisyon row). Verified against PDFs 2026-07-15.
